task: Advanced high-value task: Hybrid Ferry Energy Leg Model Governance Evidence. Scenario: an expert team is preparing a launch or release decision and needs a calculation-backed recommendation for hybrid ferry energy leg. Embedded packet: Records: R1 maneuver_kWh=78 charger_power_kW=118 charge_window_h=1; R2 maneuver_kWh=87 charger_power_kW=114 charge_window_h=4; R3 maneuver_kWh=73 charger_power_kW=129 charge_window_h=0. Remediation options: O1 changes maneuver_kWh by -12% cost=95000; O2 changes charger_power_kW by -18% cost=108200; O3 changes charge_window_h by -25% cost=65800; max_budget=134400. Rules and constraints: daily energy must fit usable battery plus charging with 20% reserve; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: calculate all derived metrics, classify each record, and explain the smallest set of values that determines the recommendation. Deliver hybrid_ferry_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
